prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2022年最低位次约3253名，2023年跃升至约2160名（前移约1093名），2024年进一步前移至约1875名（前移约285名），2025年因宁夏首次实施新高考（物理类/ 历史类）出现较大波动，最低位次回落至约3029名，较2024年后移约1154名。近四年位次呈现\"前移-后移\"交替波动特征，2025年基准位次约3029名；该校在 宁夏理科组（物理类）招生计划：2022年35人、2023年35人、2024年35人，2025年增至39人，2026年计划32人，较2025年缩减7人，缩招约18%。缩招意味着录取竞争有 所加剧，位次有前移压力。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 北京科技大学为211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学主榜排名约第35名（2021年33名→2026年35名），排名持续稳定在全国前35 位，属于顶尖211层次，对考生有较强吸引力；2026年高考周期内声誉评价为偏负面，主要涉及学术不端事件（伪造成绩单和抄袭学位论文被国家卫健委通报） ，可能对报考心理产生轻微负面影响；但抖音热度极高，总排名第1（高热），毕业典礼撑伞视频等现象级传播内容大幅提升学校曝光度，正面关注度显著。正负效应部分抵消。 冶金工程A+、材料科学与工程A+、科学技术史A+、环境科学与工程A-，共4个A-及以上学科。材料、冶金等王牌专业与该校招生专业（材料科学与工程、冶金工程 等）高度对应，对相关方向考生有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等专业社会热度高热推荐，该校在宁夏招生涵盖计算机类、人工智 能、通信工程等热门专业，有利于吸引高分考生；材料、冶金等传统优势专业属于\"生化环材\"大类（明显劝退），可能影响部分考生选择。宁夏2026年高考总人数约66000人， 较2025年（物理类44491+历史类21406≈65897）基本持平，竞争环境稳定；北京科技大学位于北京市，非宁夏本地高校， 在宁夏招生占比约0.5%-1%（2024年该校全国总招生中宁夏占比约1.2%），属于跨省招生，地域偏好因素影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次3029名、2026年缩招18% 、抖音高热带来的关注度提升、声誉偏负面轻微抵消、考生人数基本持平等因素，预计2026年最低录取位次较2025年有所前移。预测最低位次 约2673名，区间2272-3074名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间2272-3074名内，建议以二档专业为主力报考方向，一档专业可冲刺（计算机类、人工智能、通信工程等热门专业位次需求通常高于校线），三档专业作为保底选 择。位次明显优于区间下限（2272名以内）可重点冲刺一档王牌专业；位次接近区间上限（3074名附近）建议以三档保底为主。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: In 2022, the minimum ranking was approximately 3253, rising to about 2160 in 2023 (moving forward by about 1093 places), and further advancing to about 1875 in 2024 (moving forward by about 285 places). In 2025, due to the first implementation of the new college entrance examination in Ningxia (Physics Category/History Category), there was significant fluctuation, with the minimum ranking falling back to about 3029, moving backward by about 1154 places compared to 2024. Over the past four years, the rankings have shown alternating "forward-backward" fluctuation characteristics, with the baseline ranking for 2025 being about 3029. The enrollment plan for this university in the Ningxia Science Group (Physics Category) was 35 in 2022, 35 in 2023, 35 in 2024, increasing to 39 in 2025, and planned to be 32 in 2026, a reduction of 7 compared to 2025, a decrease of about 18%. This reduction means increased competition for admission, putting pressure on rankings to move forward.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: University of Science and Technology Beijing is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university, ranking about 35th on the Soft Science Chinese University Main Ranking (33rd in 2021 to 35th in 2026), maintaining a stable position in the top 35 nationally, belonging to the top-tier 211 level, which strongly attracts candidates. During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, the reputation evaluation is slightly negative, mainly involving academic misconduct incidents (falsified transcripts and plagiarized degree thesis reported by the National Health Commission), which may have a slight negative impact on application psychology. However, its popularity on Douyin is extremely high, ranking first overall (high heat), with viral content such as the graduation ceremony umbrella video significantly increasing the university's exposure, leading to significant positive attention. The positive and negative effects partially offset each other. It has A+ in Metallurgical Engineering, A+ in Materials Science and Engineering, A+ in History of Science and Technology, and A- in Environmental Science and Engineering, totaling 4 disciplines at A- or above. The top majors such as Materials and Metallurgy highly correspond to the university's enrollment majors (Materials Science and Engineering, Metallurgical Engineering, etc.), strongly attracting candidates in related fields.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering are highly recommended by social heat. The university's enrollment in Ningxia includes popular majors like Computer Science, Artificial Intelligence, and Communication Engineering, which help attract high-scoring candidates. Traditional advantageous majors like Materials and Metallurgy belong to the "Biology, Chemistry, Environment, Materials" category (clearly discouraging), which may affect some candidates' choices. The total number of candidates in Ningxia for 2026 is about 66,000, basically unchanged from 2025 (Physics Category 44,491 + History Category 21,406 ≈ 65,897), indicating a stable competitive environment. University of Science and Technology Beijing is located in Beijing, not a local university in Ningxia, with its enrollment in Ningxia accounting for about 0.5%-1% (in 2024, Ningxia accounted for about 1.2% of the university's total national enrollment), belonging to cross-provincial enrollment, with limited influence from regional preference factors.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the baseline ranking of 3029 in 2025, an 18% enrollment reduction in 2026, increased attention from high Douyin heat, slight offset from negative reputation, and basically stable candidate numbers, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will move forward compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is about 2673, with a range of 2272-3074.

Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 2272-3074, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main direction for application, with Tier 1 majors as a reach (popular majors like Computer Science, Artificial Intelligence, and Communication Engineering typically require rankings higher than the school line), and Tier 3 majors as a safety choice. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (within 2272), focus on reaching for Tier 1 top majors; if the ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (around 3074), it is recommended to mainly rely on Tier 3 majors as a safety net.
